lineage.Process: AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya NAMA_PBT TEXT # # 50 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya SINGKATAN TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya NEGERI TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya luas_h DOUBLE 12 4 # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya pbt_id TEXT # # 6 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya kemaskini DATE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya tahun_data SHORT # # 4 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField Sempadan_Operasi_WP_Putrajaya catatan TEXT # # 150 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
